metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills, distributed as plugins.

plugins.name: verify-claims
plugins.description: Verify key claims (versions, API behavior, causal inferences, executable advice) and annotate them inline as verified / partly verified / unverified.

plugins.name: fork-context
plugins.description: Fork a tangential idea out of a long session into a self-contained brief + paste-prompt for a fresh clean session, without polluting the current one.
